description: Multilingual classification eval — English dataset built from anakin87/events-scheduling@f0c948fe0ef600aeebe5aeee625b6fb318901a87 (50 unique titles, paraphrased ~3× via gpt-5.5). Same case ids appear in the ko / zh-CN / zh-TW siblings for cross-lingual comparison.
